titleStmt.title: SII 40.81: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 81. (A.R. No. B. 59 of 1930.) Guttikoṇḍa, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar of the maṇḍapa in front of the Lokēśvarasvāmi temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1508, Vyaya, Vaiśākha, ba 7, corresponding to 1586 A.D., April 30, Saturday.

Records the remission of tax (bēḍigē) by Chinavīrapanāyaniṅgāru and Jaṅggamayya for conducting offerings in the temples of Lōkēśvara, Vīrēśvara, Rāmēśvara, Perumāḷ and Hanumān at Guttikoṇḍa in Taṅgeḍa-sīma, which was his nāyaṅkara, for the merit of their father Virapa-Nāyaniṅgāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lōkēśvarāyanamaḥ
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu 15
08 Agunēṭi vyaya saṁvatsara
vaiśākha ba 7 lu janyāvula basudāṁ
nāyaniṁgāri pautṛlaina vīrapa
nāyaniṁgāri putṛlaina śrīnaṁ
ṁddula gōtṛlaina cinavīrapanāya
niṁgāru jaṁggamayyaṁgāru
taṁggeḍa śīmalōnu mā nāyaṁkka
rānaku sāgivacci guttikoṁḍḍa
nu lōkēśvarunikinni vīrēśvaru
nikinni rāmēśvarunikinni perumā
ḷlakunnuhanumaṁttunikinni
Amṛtapaḷlaku sāgivaccina pū
rvapu mānyapu kṣētrālaku kri
tamu beḍige gonaṁgānu
beḍige rokhaṁ yī tathātithi puṇya
kālamaṁddu tama taṁḍri vīrapanā
yaniṁgāriki puṇyamugā dhāra
vośi yistimigāna yī puṇyāna
ku yavvaru tappinānu kāśilōnu
tama tallidaṁḍrādulanu govu brā
hmanni vadhiyiṁccina pāpānaṁ bō
vuvāru

vināyakunikinni
svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupā
lanaṁ . paradattā
pahārēṇa . svada
ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vet . śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
